What's inside

Everything to go from
invisible to inbound

Each tool solves one specific problem. Together they cover your full LinkedIn presence — from how you look to what you say.

Tool 01
CV → LinkedIn Profile
Upload your resume. Get a fully optimized headline, about section, and experience rewrites — ready to copy and paste.
AI · instant output
Tool 02
Audience Analyzer
Enter your niche. Get a map of who to connect with, where to find them, what content resonates, and what pain points to address.
AI · strategic clarity
Tool 03
Influencer Finder
30 pre-curated niches with top LinkedIn accounts for inspiration. Search winning posts by keyword to see what's working right now.
Curated · searchable
Tool 04
"Let Me Introduce Myself" Writer
LinkedIn's most important post — most people get it wrong. This tool writes a first impression post that builds followers from day one.
AI · first post
🖼
6 Canva templates3 profile photo frames + 3 banner designs. Polished before you write a word.
💡
Bonus: 300 post ideasWhen you don't know what to write, pull from a ready list by content type.

Built by
Entrepreneur · Media founder · Silicon Valley
Marina Mogilko
Creator of Silicon Valley Girl · 18M+ audience

Marina grew her LinkedIn to 59,000+ followers. LinkedIn named her one of its recommended creators. In 2025, LinkedIn generated $80,000 in revenue for her business — through brand deals, partnerships, and inbound inquiries.

She built these tools based on what actually worked — not theory. The system behind her growth is what this kit is built on.

FAQ
Do I need a LinkedIn account?
Yes — a free account is enough. No Premium needed.
What file formats does the CV tool accept?
PDF and DOCX, up to 5MB.
How long does access last?
Lifetime access to all tools and updates.
What's the review I need to leave?
An honest written review after you've used the tools. We'll send a short form.
Does this work outside the US?
Yes. The tools work for any English-speaking market globally.
Is there a refund policy?
No refunds after access is granted. Reach out before buying if you have questions.
